'''âw-ch-k-ng''' ('''kawachkengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fight|fight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fight|fight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-ch-k-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kawachkengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwachkengoko|thiwachkengoko]] || [[word:jiwachkengoko|jiwachkengoko]] || [[word:shiwachkengoko|shiwachkengoko]] || [[word:kiwachkengoko|kiwachkengoko]]
|-
